tasks.task_goal: Slice a loaf of bread evenly for sandwiches
tasks.expected_outcome: Uniform bread slices are separated from the loaf without crushing the crumb
required_tool_attributes: long, serrated sharp edge to concentrate stress on the crust
rigid blade to prevent flexing during sawing
comfortable handle for controlled, straight strokes

tasks.task_goal: Open a cardboard shipping box by cutting the packing tape and top seam
tasks.expected_outcome: The tape and seam are cleanly severed so the box opens without tearing its panels
required_tool_attributes: razor-sharp thin blade for high local stress
rigid blade support and locking mechanism to prevent wobble
pointed tip to initiate cuts

tasks.task_goal: Prune a small tree branch that is scraping the roof
tasks.expected_outcome: The branch is cleanly cut off close to the trunk without crushing the remaining wood
required_tool_attributes: two sharp, scissor-like blades for shearing
long handles for leverage to generate high cutting force
stiff pivot and arms to maintain blade alignment under load

tasks.task_goal: Cut copper electrical wire to length for installing a light fixture
tasks.expected_outcome: The copper conductor and insulation are cleanly severed without deforming the remaining wire end
required_tool_attributes: induction-hardened cutting edges to withstand high local stress
precisely aligned jaws for complete shearing contact
high-leverage joint to amplify hand force

tasks.task_goal: Cut cotton fabric panels along a printed dress pattern
tasks.expected_outcome: Pattern pieces are separated with smooth, accurate edges that don't fray
required_tool_attributes: long, razor-sharp blades for continuous shearing
tight pivot to keep blades in close contact
offset handle to keep fabric flat on the table

tasks.task_goal: Cut PVC pipe sections for a drip irrigation manifold
tasks.expected_outcome: PVC pipe ends are squarely separated without cracking or crushing
required_tool_attributes: hardened, sharp curved blade to focus shearing stress
ratcheting mechanism to multiply applied force
anvil support to stabilize the round pipe during the cut

tasks.task_goal: Portion a finished sushi roll into bite-sized pieces
tasks.expected_outcome: Clean, even slices are cut through nori, rice, and fillings without tearing
required_tool_attributes: long, razor-sharp single-bevel edge for low-friction slicing
rigid spine to keep the cut straight
polished blade to reduce sticking

tasks.task_goal: Trim a stack of printed flyers to the bleed marks
tasks.expected_outcome: The paper stack is cleanly separated to a uniform size with crisp edges
required_tool_attributes: long, sharp straight blade to concentrate shearing along a line
lever arm to provide high mechanical advantage
rigid base and paper clamp to prevent shifting

tasks.task_goal: Trim overgrown bangs evenly at home
tasks.expected_outcome: Hair strands are cleanly severed to the desired length without snagging
required_tool_attributes: fine, razor-sharp blades for precise shearing of thin fibers
tight, smooth pivot to maintain blade contact
ergonomic handles for controlled angle and pressure

tasks.task_goal: Remove excess zip ties from a neatly bundled cable run
tasks.expected_outcome: Zip tie tails are cut off flush without sharp protrusions
required_tool_attributes: flush-ground, sharp cutting face to achieve close cuts
hardened jaws to sustain high localized stress
spring return for controlled, repeatable snips

tasks.task_goal: Fit laminate flooring by cutting a plank to length
tasks.expected_outcome: A plank is sheared cleanly to the exact measurement with minimal chipping
required_tool_attributes: hardened straight shear blade for high stress concentration
long handle for leverage to power the cut
rigid base and fence to hold the plank steady

tasks.task_goal: Resize a glass pane to fit a picture frame
tasks.expected_outcome: A controlled score line enables a clean break so the glass separates to the target dimensions
required_tool_attributes: hardened, small-radius cutting wheel for concentrated point load
rigid handle to transmit steady pressure
smooth rolling action to create a continuous score

tasks.task_goal: Break down a whole chicken by separating the thighs from the carcass
tasks.expected_outcome: Thighs are cleanly cut free along the joints with minimal tearing
required_tool_attributes: narrow, very sharp blade to focus shearing near joints
pointed tip for precise cuts around cartilage
slightly flexible yet rigidly edged blade for control around bones

tasks.task_goal: Shorten a steel chain to the exact length for hanging a planter
tasks.expected_outcome: A chain link is severed cleanly so the remaining chain is the desired length
required_tool_attributes: hardened alloy cutting jaws to withstand high compressive and shear stress
compound leverage hinges to greatly amplify input force
long, rigid handles for stability and power

tasks.task_goal: Make a circular cardboard backing for a science fair model
tasks.expected_outcome: A clean, accurate circular disc is cut from the cardboard sheet
required_tool_attributes: sharp pivoting blade to shear fibers along a curve
rigid adjustable radius arm to maintain set diameter
center pin to anchor and guide the cut

tasks.task_goal: Remove 3D-printed support sprues from a PLA model
tasks.expected_outcome: Support material is cut away flush with the model surface without gouging
required_tool_attributes: sharp, flush-cut jaws to concentrate stress and leave a smooth surface
hardened steel to resist edge damage from plastic nibs
narrow nose to access tight spaces

tasks.task_goal: Cut a galvanized sheet-metal patch to close an HVAC duct opening
tasks.expected_outcome: The sheet metal is cut to the template shape with controlled edges and minimal distortion
required_tool_attributes: sharp, serrated blades to grip and shear metal
compound leverage for high cutting force
stiff handles and aligned pivot to prevent blade spread

tasks.task_goal: Fit rigid foam insulation board between wall studs by cutting to size
tasks.expected_outcome: Foam board pieces are cleanly separated along straight score lines to snugly fit between studs
required_tool_attributes: long, razor-sharp blade to deeply score and shear foam
rigid blade lock to hold the edge steady
thin edge to focus stress without excessive crushing

tasks.task_goal: Shorten a leather belt strap before attaching a new buckle
tasks.expected_outcome: The belt end is cut squarely and cleanly to the required length without stretching the leather
required_tool_attributes: very sharp, curved rigid edge to slice dense leather fibers
broad blade for controlled push or pull cuts
comfortable handle for steady pressure application

tasks.task_goal: Cut carpet to fit around a stair tread and nosing
tasks.expected_outcome: Carpet is neatly cut to contour the stair with minimal fraying and a tight fit
required_tool_attributes: hook-shaped, razor-sharp blade to engage backing fibers
rigid handle with secure blade lock to prevent flex
thin edge to concentrate shear through dense pile and backing
